This contract is the         sole authorised oracle for the NFT contract.         Flow         \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500         1. An off-chain service signs a ScoreAttestation struct with the            trusted private key.         2. Anyone calls submitScore() with the attestation data + signature.         3. The contract recovers the signer and validates it against            `trustedSigner`.         4. If the borrower has no NFT yet, mintScore() is called first.         5. updateScore() is called with the new params._creditScoreNFT: Address of the deployed CreditScoreNFT contract
params._owner: Contract owner (can rotate signer / NFT address)

eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.borrower: The wallet whose score is being attested
params.sig: 65-byte ECDSA signature over the EIP-712 digest
params.timestamp: Unix timestamp baked into the attestation (must be                   within 5 minutes of block.timestamp)
params.zkVerified: Whether this score is backed by a ZK proof

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

ATTESTATION_WINDOW().notice: Maximum age of an attestation before it is rejected

SCORE_ATTESTATION_TYPEHASH().notice: EIP-712 typehash for ScoreAttestation keccak256("ScoreAttestation(address borrower,uint16 score,uint64 timestamp,bool zkVerified)")

creditScoreNFT().notice: The soul-bound credit score NFT contract

setCreditScoreNFT(address).notice: Point the oracle at a different CreditScoreNFT deployment

submitScore(address,uint16,bool,uint64,b.notice: Submit an EIP-712-signed score attestation and apply it on-chain.

trustedSigner().notice: The off-chain key whose signatures are accepted
